message.content:
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam linetype ortho

package "exercise3" {

  class GameLogic
  class BoardPrinter
  class WinCondition

  class Board
  class Move
  class Piece
  enum Player

  package "movevalidator" {
    interface MoveValidator

    class MovesForward
    class MoveLength
    class MovesDiagonal
    class OpponentPieceBetweenJump
    class StartPieceValid
    class TargetFieldEmpty
    class NoOtherJumpMovePossible
  }

  ' GameLogic dependencies
  GameLogic ..> BoardPrinter
  GameLogic ..> WinCondition
  GameLogic ..> Board
  GameLogic ..> Move
  GameLogic ..> Piece
  GameLogic ..> Player
  GameLogic ..> MoveValidator

  ' BoardPrinter dependencies
  BoardPrinter ..> Board

  ' WinCondition dependency
  WinCondition ..> MoveValidator

  ' MoveValidator realizations
  MovesForward ..|> MoveValidator
  MoveLength ..|> MoveValidator
  MovesDiagonal ..|> MoveValidator
  OpponentPieceBetweenJump ..|> MoveValidator
  StartPieceValid ..|> MoveValidator
  TargetFieldEmpty ..|> MoveValidator
  NoOtherJumpMovePossible ..|> MoveValidator

  ' Additional dependency shown from MoveValidator to NoOtherJumpMovePossible
  MoveValidator ..> NoOtherJumpMovePossible
}
@enduml
